name: Sauerbraten (Sweet Sour Beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water and wine vinegar in a large pot, bring to a simmer.
2. Place the beef in a covered crock (non-metal container) with the vinegar mixture.
3. Add salt, parsley, pepper, sugar, and onion slices. Cover and refrigerate for 3 days, turning daily.
4. Drain the marinade and reserve it.
5. Lightly season the meat with flour, then brown well in butter in a separate pot or pan.
6. Add the onion slices and 3 cups of reserved marinade to the pot. Cover and simmer until tender.
7. Transfer the meat to a hot serving dish and keep warm.
8. Skim any fat from the liquid.
9. Mix flour with cold water to form a slurry, then stir into the pan.
10. Add the beef stock and continue cooking for a few more minutes.
